title: taskkill compat shim: a11y-first kill routing
desc: taskkill.exe is a busybox symlink to wkappbot that translates classic taskkill flags (/F /T /PID /IM) into anchored regex grap patterns for a11y kill. Exact image-name match prevents over-matching (notepad.exe does NOT kill notepad++.exe). /FI filter unsupported -- use JSON5 grap directly. Help text served via CommandHelpMap (fixed suggest #15).
steps: Invoke via taskkill.exe (busybox symlink) OR wkappbot taskkill -- both routed through TaskkillCompatCommand.
/PID N maps to regex:^\[N\] (anchored PID prefix). /IM name maps to regex:^\[\d+\]name\.exe$ (exact, anchored image name).
Bare positional: digits -> /PID, *.exe -> /IM, else passed as grap pattern. Multiple targets dispatch one a11y kill per target.
/F is ignored (a11y kill is force by default). /T tree-kill is noted -- a11y kill already sweeps child processes. /FI filter triggers a warning with grap workaround.
For complex filters use grap directly: wkappbot a11y kill {proc:'...',title:'...'} -- the shim covers taskkill's classic subset only.
Run 'wkappbot taskkill --help' to see the full help served from CommandHelpMap.
author: claude
